goals: Find and read a webpage or document about a social justice topic for an upcoming debate
Extract specific content related to the key arguments and statistics for the debate

user_agent_config.personality: Persuasive, uses rhetoric and storytelling in debates, focused on social issues and equity
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Does not know specific tool names or APIs; communicates needs in natural language

end_condition: User has obtained relevant content for their debate and can proceed with their argument preparation
